name: Solar Rejuvenation
description:
Ghoran - The warmth and light of the sun gives you life. If you rest outdoors for 10 minutes during the day, you regain Hit Points equal to your @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2)*@actor.abilities.con.mod)[healing]]{Constitution modifier × half your level}. You gain this benefit in addition to any healing from .

Leshy - If you rest outdoors for 10 minutes during the day, you regain Hit Points equal to your @Damage[(floor(@actor.level/2)*@actor.abilities.con.mod)[healing]]{Constitution modifier × half your level}. You gain this benefit in addition to any healing from . Leshies whose plant nourishment does not rely on photosynthesis require a similarly suitable environment. For example, fungus leshies need dark, damp environments and a pile of decaying plant matter.
